title: config_flow.py: 5-step config flow + options flow
acceptance_criteria: 5 config flow steps implemented: sensors selection, prices, battery params, sim period, results/confirm
Uses entity/number selectors appropriate for each field (entity selector for sensors, number selector for prices/params)
Options flow allows editing all parameters post-setup and triggers coordinator recompute
Validates required sensors exist and are numeric/energy sensors
Errors and abort reasons map to translation keys from strings.json
